productDisplayName: Nike Men Barca Rugby Maroon T-shirt
description: Composition Maroon T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton and Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neckline, long sleeves, appliqued FCB seal on the upper left chest, FCB brand embroidered at the back and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with comfort while you support your favourite team in this T-shirt from nike. The cotton material keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the Barcalona logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
